cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Archival Strategies: Big Objects, External Objects, and the 80/20 Rule'. Subtitle in white: 'Salesforce archival data lifecycle architecture for hot, warm, cold, and governed records'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'HOT OPERATIONAL DATA' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'Cases < 18 months', 'Orders in SLA', 'Open Tasks' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'WARM ACCESS DATA' vivid purple border — modules 'External Objects', 'OData APIs', 'Warehouse Views' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'COLD IMMUTABLE HISTORY' vivid teal/green border — modules 'Big Objects', 'Audit Snapshots', 'Retention Indexes' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: '80/20 Lifecycle Router' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'Data 360 Zero Copy' and 'Agentforce 2.0 Grounding'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'Record Aging' → 'Classify' → 'Archive' → 'Retrieve by Index' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'The 80/20 Salesforce Archival Rule'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'The 80/20 Salesforce Archival Rule'. Subtitle 'Separate operational behavior from historical retention'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'HOT 20% with lightning icon', 'COLD 80% with archive box icon', 'INDEXED RETRIEVAL with magnifying glass icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: One Object Stores Everything' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Lifecycle-Based Storage' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id, Subject FROM Case WHERE ClosedDate < LAST_N_YEARS:7 ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC'; right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'SELECT AccountId__c, ClosedMonth__c, CaseId__c, Payload__c FROM Case_Audit__b WHERE AccountId__c = :accountId AND ClosedMonth__c = :month'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Hot records stay operational', 'Cold records use immutable indexes', 'Analytics leave list views'. Footer bar: 'Do not make Case a ten-year archive table'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Big Object vs External Object Retrieval Patterns'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Big Object vs External Object Retrieval Patterns'. Subtitle 'Choose by ownership, latency, and query shape'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'BIG OBJECT: immutable Salesforce snapshot with database icon', 'EXTERNAL OBJECT: remote system of record with API plug icon', 'SUMMARY OBJECT: fast UX context with gauge icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Archive Query Ignores Access Pattern' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Indexed and Virtualized Access' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id FROM Case WHERE ClosedDate < 2018-01-01 AND Subject LIKE \\'%refund%\\''; right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'SELECT CaseId__c, Payload__c FROM Case_Audit__b WHERE AccountId__c = :acct AND ClosedMonth__c = :month'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Big Objects need left-prefix indexes', 'External Objects need reliable APIs', 'Summaries keep pages fast'. Footer bar: 'Archive retrieval is a contract, not a search wish list'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
